case_title: MALTA, JOSEPH vs. HUFF, DANA DEAN AKA DANA HUFF et al

docket_entries.description: DECLARATION IN SUPPORT OF JUDGMENT FILED BY PLAINTIFF MALTA, JOSEPH

UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 1169 C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF MALTA, JOSEPH RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT HUFF, DANA DEAN AKA DANA HUFF THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 628 CAPP ST #303, LEASE FORFEITED, INCLUDES ALL TENANTS, SUBTENANTS, NAMED CLAIMANTS, AND OTHER OCCUPANTS OF THE PREMISES.
